title: alchemilla denticulata f. rubricaulis
intro: Alchemilla denticulata f. rubricaulis, also known as Lady's Mantle, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The medicinal properties of Alchemilla denticulata f. rubricaulis include its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and promote wound healing. Alchemilla denticulata f. rubricaulis can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to support women's health and well-being.
